Examples

A gallery of molecules rendered with SmilesDrawer. Click "Open in Playground" to customize any molecule.

Simple Molecules Aromatic Rings Heterocycles Drugs & Pharmaceuticals Complex Molecules Stereochemistry
Render theme:

Aromatic Rings

Heterocycles

Rings containing nitrogen, oxygen, or sulfur

Pyridine
c1ccncc1

Open in Playground
Imidazole
c1cnc[nH]1
Open in Playground
Furan
c1ccoc1
Open in Playground
Thiophene

Drugs & Pharmaceuticals

Common drug molecules

Aspirin
CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O
Open in Playground
Caffeine
Cn1c(=O)c2c(ncn2C)n(c1=O)C
Open in Playground
Ibuprofen
CC(C)Cc1ccc(cc1)C(C)C(=O)O
Open in Playground
Nicotine
CN1CCC[C@H]1c2cccnc2
Open in Playground
Penicillin G
CC1([C@@H](N2[C@H](S1)[C@@H](C2=O)NC(=O)Cc3ccccc3)C(=O)O)C
Open in Playground
Morphine
CN1CC[C@]23c4c5ccc(O)c4O[C@H]2[C@@H](O)C=C[C@H]3[C@@H]1C5
Open in Playground
Paracetamol
CC(=O)Nc1ccc(O)cc1
Open in Playground
Dopamine
NCCc1ccc(O)c(O)c1
Open in Playground

Complex Molecules

Steroids, sugars, and macromolecules

Cholesterol
C[C@H](CCCC(C)C)[C@H]1CC[C@@H]2[C@@]1(CC[C@H]3[C@H]2CC=C4[C@@]3(CC[C@@H](C4)O)C)C
Open in Playground
Glucose
OC[C@H]1OC(O)[C@H](O)[C@@H](O)[C@@H]1O
Open in Playground
Testosterone
C[C@]12CC[C@H]3[C@@H](CCC4=CC(=O)CC[C@@]34C)[C@@H]1CC[C@@H]2O
Open in Playground
ATP
c1nc(c2c(n1)n(cn2)[C@@H]3[C@@H]([C@@H]([C@H](O3)COP(=O)(O)OP(=O)(O)OP(=O)(O)O)O)O)N
Open in Playground

Stereochemistry

Molecules with chiral centers

L-Alanine
N[C@@H](C)C(=O)O
Open in Playground
D-Alanine
N[C@H](C)C(=O)O
Open in Playground
L-Tryptophan
N[C@@H](Cc1c[nH]c2ccccc12)C(=O)O

Thalidomide
O=C1CCC(N2C(=O)c3ccccc3C2=O)C(=O)N1
